name: GitHub trending (infra & devtools)
notes: Highest signal-to-noise channel for technical first-time founders; repos with sudden star velocity are the strongest predictor.

name: HackNation
notes: Strong for early technical signal but teams often need 2-3 quarters before they're fundable.

name: arXiv preprint alerts (applied ML)
notes: Low volume but highest average founder domain-expertise score of any channel.

name: Forge Labs (accelerator)
notes: Demo day cohorts consistently pre-screened for basic fundability; conversion is high but so is competition from other funds.

name: Southern Cross (accelerator)
notes: Underweighted by most funds; overlaps well with the Overlooked Geographies thesis preset.

name: Maintainer direct outreach
notes: Manual, low-volume, but the highest quality score of any channel — reserved for maintainers with sustained multi-year commit history.

name: Cascade Summit (conference applications)
notes: Mixed quality; useful mainly for fintech and proptech sourcing given attendee mix.

name: Google Search (launch & press signals)
notes: Broadest reach, lowest signal-to-noise; useful for catching launches outside the usual accelerator/GitHub circuit, but needs heavier manual triage.
